programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Hank and Ginger touch Ben's computer without permission; a scary pirate ghost appears.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: The Super K's accidentally took off in a hot air balloon without Mr. Arnold and crashed onto a deserted island.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: The Super K's must do everything that they can to stop Nigel Danforth and his Fearsome Foursome from cancelling Christmas forever.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten
programme.desc: Dr Superior plans to kidnap Santa Claus after the Super Ks successfully stop Nigel Danforth and his Fearsome Foursome from canceling Christmas forever.

programme.title: Radio Rebel
programme.desc: Tara Adams is just an ordinary high school junior, except for one little thing. Tara has a secret identity--she's Radio Rebel, the most popular radio DJ in Seattle.

programme.title: Wish Upon a Star
programme.desc: In this cult classic, younger sister Hayley Wheaton (Danielle Harris) wishes to switch places with her popular older sister Alexia (Katherine Heigl) and the two bickering siblings awaken to find the wish has come true.

programme.title: The Steam Engines of Oz
programme.desc: 100 years after Dorothy clicked her ruby red slippers to leave the magical land of oz, Victoria, a young engineer who keeps the city gears moving, joins the Scarecrow and a not so cowardly lion to once again help the Tin Man find his heart

programme.title: The Strawberry Shortcake: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes.

programme.title: Thomas and the Magic Railroad
programme.desc: Thomas the Tank Engine's feature film debut follows Thomas and Mr. Conductor (Alec Baldwin) as they cross between the real world and the fictional Island of Sodor, in an attempt to recover lost gold dust.

programme.title: Under The Sea 2
programme.desc: The holidays are just around the corner and the friendly inhabitants of Bubbletown are on a mission to have the grandest time under the sea! Dive in with the Bubbletown crew in Under The Sea 2!

programme.title: The Spongebob Squarepants Movie
programme.desc: He's the wacky underwater star of an oceanful of adventures—he's SpongeBob SquarePants in his original movie debut! Join SpongeBob, his pal Patrick, and the rest of the Bikini Bottom gang as they embark on a thrilling, action-packed adventure.

programme.title: The Spongebob Movie: Sponge Out of Water
programme.desc: On a mission to save his world, SpongeBob SquarePants is headed to ours for the first time ever! When Pirate Burger Beard steals the Krabby Patties recipe, SpongeBob and friends must unleash their inner superheroes to defeat a supervillain.

programme.title: The Spongebob Squarepants Movie
programme.desc: He's the wacky underwater star of an oceanful of adventures—he's SpongeBob SquarePants in his original movie debut! Join SpongeBob, his pal Patrick, and the rest of the Bikini Bottom gang as they embark on a thrilling, action-packed adventure.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: A great darkness has fallen upon Ninjago as Garmadon’s Super-Weapon has turned it evil but Lloyd and the Ninjas discover that light is more powerful than dark - and the final and ultimate battle is on.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After a time of peace, the Ninja are called back into action. The spirit of the defeated Overlord has infected the electric grid of Ninjago and is using all available technology to exact his revenge on Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja go into hiding but an army of the Digtial Overlord’s evil robotic Nindroids are hunting them wherever they go.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The power is out in all of Ninjag, but the hard drive containing the Digital Overlord has disappeared. Some mysterious Stranger has stolen it and is now sending alternatively powered Nindroids to attack the Ninja and capture Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Stranger and the hard drive with the Digital Overlord are still missing. The ninjas’ search for them brings them deep underground where they are assisted by an old enemy. But the Stranger and his Nindroids are getting ever closer to capturing Lloyd.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Pythor the Anachondrai and his Nindroids have captured Lloyd and are draining his golden powers to bring the Overlord back into Ninjago. And the Ninja must use the Techno Blades in a daring rescue … inside the Overlord's corrupted hard drive

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Lloyd is free but Pythor and the Overlord are nowhere to be found. However the Ninja have a cryptic clue to their next plan - something called Codename: Arcturus. But what is it?

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Back in Ninjago it is time for the final battle with the reborn, god-like Overlord. The stakes have never been greater and one ninja must make the ultimate sacrifice to try to stop his reign of destruction

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninja receive an invitation to partake in the Tournament of Elements and a clue that Zane might be alive, they accept and travel to a Lost Island owned by notorious crime lord Master Chen in order to save their friend.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: On the island, Lloyd learns that his father used to train under the deceitful Master Chen and when the Ninja meet the playfully deceitful ruler, they realize they are in a tournament where “Only one can remain.”

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In order find Zane, the Ninja stay in the tournament to get past the first round but Chen complicates things by changing the bracket and pitting Jay against Cole.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen pits everyone against each other in a ludicrous roller skating event called Thunderblade and all contestants team up against the Ninja.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja have a secret alliance of elemental fighters, Cole has found Zane and Nya is a spy within Chen’s Kabuki to figure out what nefarious plot Chen is up to.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Nya has proof of Chen’s plan but he entices the contestants to hunt her down with promises to advance the winner, forcing the Ninja in a race to get to her first.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After stealing the remaining contestant’s powers, Chen only needs Lloyd’s power to complete the spell and knowing his daughter has feelings for Kai, Chen tries to enlist the Fire Ninja by promising to share secrets about his parents.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Chen has failed to bring the return of the Serpentine War but Clouse reveals there’s another way – his daughter has the ability to absorb the power of every fighter she comes across, so she can complete the ceremony.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja reunite with Wu and turn to the aid of a shrunken Pythor in order to figure out how to defeat the unstoppable Anacondrai.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja and fighters discover there’s a strategic location called The Corridor of Elders where they can make their last stand against Chen’s Anacondrai army... but even with the new Destiny Bounty, their forces still aren’t strong enough.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Kai promises to watch over Lloyd when Lloyd fears the loss of his father will make the path ahead uncertain– but when Wu sends them out on an errand for his new Tea Farm, Lloyd goes on a solo mission…

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When Moro gives chase to the Bounty and steals Wu’s staff, Wu shares the story of Moro: the boy who wanted to be the Green Ninja

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja travel to the Village of Stiix to find the thief who stole the scroll of Airjitzu, but the self-serving Ronan isn’t keen to sell it cheaply so the Ninja must figure out a way to make money on the docks.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja hear of another way to learn Airjitzu - from the ghost of Sensei Yang at his haunted temple - but there’s a warning; if you are trapped in it by sunrise, you will become a ghost, too.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: Now that the Ninja know Airjitzu, they get briefed about how the next stage to finding the tomb is to get ‘The Sword of Sanctuary’ from Cloud Kingdom, which can only be reached from the top of the Wailing Alps.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: In Cloud Kingdom, a realm where destinies are written, the Ninja must get the Sword of Sanctuary, a powerful relic that can see past the traps surrounding the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master – but tensions are high as Moro’s escape from the Cursed …

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja now have all the items they need to get to the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master but before they can figure out the last riddle that leads to the location of the tomb.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninja use Ronan’s airship to travel to the tomb of the First Spinjitzu Master in an underwater cave under the ocean, only to find out Moro is already there.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego recibe la sorpresa que después de una muchos años de crímenes su papá le deja un jugoso botín como herencia, mientras que Jonathan y Ortega buscan a un adulto que los lleve a la premier de la película del momento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se muda a un lujoso departamento y se dedica a buscar a un nuevo roommate, mientras que El Abuelo y Jonathan se pelean por quedarse con el cuarto una vez que el Noruego dejo el departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Jonathan es admitido a una reconocida escuela privada y Gaspar al no poder cubrir los gastos decide aventurarse con Peluzín en unos negocios turbios, mientras el Noruego busca consejos por parte de su familia porque no esta contento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El abuelo se ahoga con un hueso de pollo y LFDB se ve forzada a buscar ayuda de emergencia, mientras que el Noruego y Peluzín deciden ingresar a un gimnasio y competir por los resultados.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo se involucra sentimentalmente con la nueva roommate del Noruego, la cual esconde un oscuro secreto, mientras tanto Peluzín y Jony buscan lanzar a Olaf al estrellato.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Tenta-Culo celebra su aniversario y hace una gran fiesta donde invita a todos, desafortunadamente durante el evento sucede un crimen y nadie puede salir hasta encontrar al responsable.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar y el Abuelo se topan con una familia muy peculiar, situación que el Abuelo busca aprovechar, mientras que Peluzín y Pitipu buscan curar a Don Sebas de una extraña adicción.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El noruego busca crear un vínculo de nuevo con su hijo Olaf por medio de un regalo, mientras que el Abuelo, Johnatan, Peluzín y todo el edificio están vueltos locos con los álbumes de estampitas del mundial 2018.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego cansado de que todo mundo lo busque solo por su dinero busca a Pitipú para que le ayude a idear un plan, mientras que Peluzín se embarca en el mundo de la robótica.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Ortega se va unos días a vivir con Jonathan y esto crea un conflicto con Olaf, mientras Irmita espera la visita de su prima a quien le esconde un gran secreto.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El edificio Pino es desalojado por causas de fuerza mayor y todos tienen que buscar donde vivir, mientras que el Abuelo se deja caer en una espiral descendente debido a su gran ego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego busca desesperadamente una forma para recuperar su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo se hace adicto al videojuego de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego todavía no puede asimilar que perdió toda su fortuna, mientras que el Abuelo malaconseja a Peluzín de cómo pagar la renta atrasada de su departamento.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú busca ayudar a Don Sebas con su problema de peso, mientras que Peluzín y el Noruego buscan aprovecharse de un afamado cantante del edificio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño virus se empieza a propagar, infectando a todos en el edificio, mientras que el Abuelo y Jonathan buscan revivir a Irmita después de que Peluzín la deja en coma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El colegio organiza un viaje todo pagado a Acapulco para reforzar la relación "Padres e Hijos", y todos buscan colarse a esa vacación, así tengan hijos o no. Al final la vacación no resulta como esperaban.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo sufre un accidente y es llevado de emergencia al hospital pero no es posible la operación. Deciden esperar a que se cure solo, llevándose una sorpresa. Mientras tanto, Olaf decide pedirle ayuda escolar a Jonathan y termina por aprovecharse.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Mientras que el Abuelo está vuelto loco por encontrar su revista favorita, Peluzín desentierra la verdad sobre su verdadera familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Olaf se lleva una sorpresa muy desagradable al estar instalando su altar de muertos, mientras que el Abuelo se burla de Gaspar frente a toda su oficina lo que ocasiona una guerra entre ambos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y Peluzín buscan lucran aprovechando el próximo paro de agua en la ciudad, mientras que el Noruego nos revela por fin después de tanto tiempo el porque de su miedo al baño.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Los Lambreton son los encargados de organizar la fiesta navideña de este año en su casa, mientras que Don Sebas extraña a su país natal y piensa en regresar.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo despierta la curiosidad en el Noruego por conocer a su padre y este le pide ayuda a Gaspar para que lo acompañe en esta misión que ha hecho como su única prioridad. Mientras tanto el Abuelo encamina a Jonathan en su despertar sexual.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A corporate raider is linked to the murder of a sleazy lawyer who planned a class action suit against him.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A juror bribed to throw the trial of a crime boss is murdered; the mobster's attorney is arrested for the crime.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When a wealthy socialite's estranged daughter is killed, the detectives are led to the accountant responsible for the young woman's trust fund.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Kincaid and McCoy are determined to convict both the man who shot an abortion doctor and the activist whose rhetoric may have encouraged the incident.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The probe of a Wall Street executive's murder leads to a top broker who has a history of criminal behavior.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigation of a pornographer leads to a gang of teens who videotape their sexual exploits with female classmates.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The probe of a woman's attempt on her husband's life leads to a fertility doctor with a high rate of success.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: Expelled from an exclusive boys school, an underprivileged youth, a gifted student, is suspected of a trustee's murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: When an explosion at a construction site kills a boy, McCoy and Kincaid try to exonerate a demolitions expert wrongly convicted of the crime.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The stabbing murder of a husband and wife prompts Briscoe and Logan to investigate Steven Bartlett, an alcoholic who was abused as a child.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: After learning controversial therapy may have caused an autistic's death, McCoy must discredit the main witness.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The death of a fellow detective and childhood friend forces Logan to deal with repressed memories about the school he attended.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The investigations of seemingly unrelated murders of a cab driver and a hit man lead Briscoe and Logan to the cabbie's wife.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: The detectives arrest the father of a woman with multiple personalities for the murder of a psychiatrist.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A newly elected, gay councilman's companion and his ousted opponent are suspects in the politician's murder.

programme.title: Law & Order
programme.desc: A murder victim's mother fatally wounds the prime suspect in the case; then evidence suggests the woman hired her daughter's assailant.

programme.title: Modern Marvels

programme.desc: A visit to the United States Mint and the Bureau of Printing and Engraving to see the secretive government facilities where the legal tender is generated; with a storied past as tantalizing as the wealth they create, these mints can spit fortunes.

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: With newfound allies won in the battle at Dressrosa, and as the Navy watches, Luffy and the Straw Hats depart Dressrosa for open water. But will Luffy accept the oath of allegiance given by his new fleet?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Straw Hats are underway, Doflamingo has serious predictions for the upset of the world order! Meanwhile, the recent actions in Dressrosa have led to surprising results!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While heading to the next island, Zou, Luffy's appetite causes them trouble and he and Bartolomeo find themselves entangled in the scheme of a pirate lord who can manipulate silver.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The Tram-Man arrives! And has Luffy, Bartolomeo and Desire on the run! The deeper the three fall into the pit, however, the more clear it becomes that Bill's group hides a terrible secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Bartolomeo, and Desire make their way up the mineshaft, but Bill's assassin, Peseta, has other plans! Just when the going gets tough, help arrives, and Zoro battles the assassin head on!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy, Desire, and Bartolomeo go up against Bill! But the mad, Smelt-Smelt man becomes deranged and lets his true power unfurl! Do Luffy and the others have any hope of exposing Bill's self-serving aims and turning his gang against him?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Bartolomeo recounts the formation of the Straw Hats, sharing their moving story with the rest of his crew! Meanwhile, the mysterious island of Zou approaches in the distance, obscured by fog. But when the haze clears, no one is expecting what they see!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others arrive at the mysterious land of Zou, and find the Sunny. But when they board, they find the other Straw Hats have already disembarked. Thus, Luffy, Zoro, Robin and the others take on the challenge of climbing the monstrous elephant!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Finally scaling the elephant's back, the Straw Hats continue their search for the other half of their crew! But the mysterious "island" on the back of the elephant may hold more danger than they bargained for, as they learn they are not alone!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy pushes deeper into the mysterious forest on the elephant's back, but he's treading in territory where is not welcome! Meanwhile, Usopp and the others make a startling discovery in a ruined city!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others survive the Rain-Ruption and learn of its vital role in maintaining life on Zou.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others are unexpectedly welcomed at the fortress and treated well by the Minks, although they have to navigate some cultural differences… And Nami starts sharing what happened to them after they left Dressrosa.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy and the others learn about the dangerous intruders who have come to Zou, and why the island is wrecked! Afterwards, Luffy's loose lips get them into trouble!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Duke Dogstorm - the Straw Hats finally meet the ruler of this strange land, and learn more about the battle that took place here; and the mysterious system by which the island is ruled!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Day turns to night as the Minks keep up their onslaught against the invading Beast Pirates! But Jack's amazing Devil Fruit power may end the elephant island once and for all!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Night and day, Jack faces the fury of the two sworn defenders of Zou, but while they put up a good fight, the Minks aren't able to subdue Jack, especially after he brings out his secret weapon.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: In the aftermath of Jack's deadly attack on the island of Zou, Chopper and Sanji rush in to save the fallen Mink Tribe - but they will need the help of Caesar to overcome the poisonous effects of the gas!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: More of the dramatic happenings on Zou are revealed as we learn that Jack's pirate band were not the only visitors to the elephant island! And what about the mysterious fate of Sanji?

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The mystery of Sanji's disappearance deepens as Luffy learns that Big Mom's lackeys have caught up with him and the rest - and carry with them an invitation from Big Mom that simply can't be refused!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji's dire situation has become clear, but instead of rallying against Big Mom's crew, he submits to go along with them to bring an end to this situation. But being separated from one of his crew is more than Luffy is willing to tolerate!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: There's only one key to finding out what happened to Sanji - and Luffy and the others make their way towards finding out more about their friend's disappearance, but on their way the indigenous fauna give them trouble!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy hatches a plan to help Sanji, but he'll have to go alone to avoid an all-out war with Big Mom. Meanwhile, Kin'emon and Kanjuro finally arrive at Zou, unwittingly setting the stage for the Minks' thirst for revenge!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The samurai have landed! And they make their way into the country of Zou unaware of the welcome they will receive by the Minks!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Revelations abound as the true nature of the Wano clan and their relationship with the Minks is revealed! Momonosuke's role is greater than any had imagined! But even more shocking - the visage of Raizo the Ninja!

programme.title: Unknown Serial Killers of America
programme.desc: Chilling confessions from a vicious slasher detail only some of his 100+ victims; when he's set to be the first serial killer ever released from prison, an eyewitness from decades prior could force justice on the man who vows to kill again.

programme.title: Unknown Serial Killers of America
programme.desc: In the '90s, a deranged killer stalks sex workers in Riverside, Calif., claiming the lives of 13 women; when a would-be victim describes the perp to police, the race is on to catch the murderous john before he strikes again.

programme.title: Unknown Serial Killers of America
programme.desc: Five corpses are found on the Florida hog trails; the investigation stalls until two men narrowly escape the perp's clutches; years later, eight more bodies are found in nearby woods, leaving police to wonder if it's the same evil killer.

programme.title: Unknown Serial Killers of America
programme.desc: Multiple unidentified bodies are found inside barrels in a New Hampshire forest; decades later, a murder 3,000 miles away reveals their connection to a serial predator who targets women and children, and changes his identity after every violent kill.

programme.title: Unknown Serial Killers of America
programme.desc: When the bodies of 12 Black women surface in Missouri and Illinois, the serial killer taunts authorities by sending a cryptic letter to the local paper; as disturbing video evidence emerges, the scope of his crimes is uncovered.

programme.title: Unknown Serial Killers of America
programme.desc: When droves of young gay men disappear in Indiana in the '90s, an amateur sleuth uncovers clues that point to a likely killer; with little physical evidence, the case stalls until a mind-boggling 10,000 bones are unearthed in a family's backyard.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: After exiting an upscale Manhattan nightclub, 26-year-old Joey informs his crew he's going to an after-party with a handful of people he just met, never to be heard from again; his family and friends help the NYPD to solve this famous case.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: With 2,000 audience members watching a ballet at the world-famous Metropolitan Opera House, orchestra violinist Helen takes a break and leaves her $20,000 violin on her chair, never to return.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: Mama Edna, a pillar of the Haitian community in Brooklyn, is adored by all as the matriarch of East Flatbush; when she is found murdered in her home, NYPD uncovers a Voodoo practice that leads them to a web of the unthinkable.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: A tight-knit Orthodox Jewish community is terrified when police respond to a mother's 911 call from her ransacked house to break down the locked bedroom door of her daughter, 18-year-old Aliza, to find Aliza naked and dead on the floor.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When devoted girlfriends are murderously attacked in their Park Slope Brooklyn home, the NYPD doubts the surviving partner's story; these suspicions outrage members of the LGBTQ community who demand the real killer be found.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: At only 17, Catherine leaves hometown Ohio to come to New York with a dream of dancing on Broadway; three short years later she is found viciously stabbed to death in her Manhattan apartment, inches from a critical hidden clue.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When an aspiring writer and painter in the vibrant Soho art scene of the early '80s is found murdered just two days after her debut book is published, her devastated husband offers a critical clue.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: A single mother who is pregnant with her second child says goodnight to her 12-year-old daughter in their Brooklyn home at midnight; by morning, she is found dead miles away in the Hudson River of midtown Manhattan.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: In the most expensive zip code in Manhattan, an aging, eccentric art collector is found strangled in his apartment.

programme.title: New York Homicide
programme.desc: When the owner of a Brooklyn pizzeria is gunned down in broad daylight in his backyard, the news publishes mafia theories; the FBI joins the NYPD to investigate.

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: Ash and Pikachu meet an unusual Trainer who would really like to add a Pikachu to his team of Pichu and Raichu!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: Our heroes learn about the Wallace Cup, a prestigious Pokémon Contest hosted by Contest Master Wallace—and then Dawn unexpectedly gets to meet the man himself!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series
programme.desc: After they learn that the Hearthome City Gym Leader is still away, Ash and Dawn discover a different kind of competition to keep them busy!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.desc: At Pokémon Summer Academy, our heroes are working on a report about the Water-type Pokémon in a nearby lake when a mystery begins to unfold!

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon the Series

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash conoce a algunos estudiantes, quienes molestan a su compañero Joe. Joe insiste en que se necesita un trato duro para que él sea lo suficientemente fuerte para graduarse. Ash no está de acuerdo.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Completamente perdidos, nuestros héroes llegan a un pueblo que no aparece en su mapa. Este tranquilo lugar está habitado por Pokémon que han sido heridos en batalla o abandonados por sus entrenadores.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Conforme nuestros héroes se acercan a Ciudad Carmín, se encuentran con un Charmander herido, sentado sobre una piedra en el paso de una montaña. Más tarde descubren por qué está esperando ahí.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos caminan por un sendero y caen en un hoyo cavado por un grupo de traviesos Squirtle. ¿Por qué el Escuadrón Squirtle es una amenaza para la gente del lugar?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: El grupo conoce a Bill, un investigador Pokémon que está esperando en su faro la llegada de un Pokémon único en su tipo, nunca antes visto por los humanos. ¿Acaso existirá un Pokémon así?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ansioso por ganar una medalla, Ash reta al Lt. Surge. Pikachu entra sin ganas a la batalla, donde descubre que su oponente es un Raichu, un feroz Pokémon con un tremendo poder eléctrico, ¡y la forma evolucionada de Pikachu!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash y sus amigos abordan el crucero St. Anne gracias a los boletos proporcionados por Jessie y James disfrazados. Su más reciente plan es atraer entrenadores Pokémon hacia el barco para robar sus Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Una tormenta obliga a todos, excepto al Equipo Rocket y a nuestros héroes, a abandonar el zozobrante St. Anne. Ash, Brock y Misty deben hacer equipo con sus antiguos enemigos para sobrevivir esta bochornosa situación.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Mientras nuestros héroes y el Equipo Rocket sobreviven contra toda posibilidad al hundimiento del St. Anne, se ven arrastrados a otra peligrosa situación cuando son atacados por el Pokémon Gyarados.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Cuando unos Tentacool interfieren con la construcción de un hotel, una mujer ofrece una recompensa a quien pueda repelerlos. Sin embargo, nuestros héroes deben entrar en acción cuando la treta del Equipo Rocket falla.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes llegan a un pequeño pueblo porteño donde se celebra un festival de verano. Para recuperarse de su duro viaje, Ash y sus amigos deciden relajarse y disfrutar las festividades.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Cuando los chicos ven a un grupo de Butterfree volando sobre el océano, Ash decide liberar a su propio Butterfree. Luego de ser rechazado una vez, ¿podrá el Butterfree de Ash ganar el corazón de su rosado amor?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Los chicos finalmente llegan a Ciudad Azafrán, donde una jovencita está al mando de un gimnasio Pokémon con sus poderes psíquicos. ¡Si Ash derrota a la líder de gimnasio Sabrina, ganará su cuarta medalla de gimnasio!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Tras su derrota ante Sabrina, Ash debe atrapar a un Pokémon tipo Fantasma para acabar con el tipo Psíquico de la líder del Gimnasio Azafrán. Se dirige hacia la Torre Pokémon en Pueblo Lavanda, donde se dice que habitan.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de dejar la Torre Pokémon acompañados de Haunter, Ash regresa a Ciudad Azafrán con una sola meta en mente: ¡ganar una Medalla de Gimnasio de la poderosa Líder de Gimnasio tipo Psíquico, Sabrina!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Cuando Ash intenta atrapar a un Mankey salvaje, este pierde el control y usa Golpe contra todo el grupo; ¡incluso roba la gorra de Ash! ¿Encontrará Ash la forma de apaciguar a este belicoso Pokémon?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Tras insultar el perfume de la Líder de Gimnasio Erika en una tienda departamental, Ash debe ir a extremos increíbles para poder poner un pie en el Gimnasio Celadon, ¡sin mencionar el considerarlo digno de retarla!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: La Oficial Jenny revela que una ola de sueño afecta al área desde hace varios días. Nuestros héroes sospechan que tiene que ver con la desaparición de varios niños y el porqué los Pokémon no mejoran en el Centro Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ante la insistente petición de Brock, nuestros héroes hacen una parada en un lugar bien conocido por los criadores Pokémon por sus salones de belleza Pokémon.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: A las afueras de Ciudad Fucsia, nuestros héroes se encuentran con Hitmonchan, un Pokémon tipo Pelea. Sin pensarlo, Ash lo enfrenta, pero Pikachu y él son derrotados. ¿Quién es el misterioso entrenador de este Hitmonchan?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Cuando un apagón sumerge a Ciudad Grisácea en la oscuridad, Ash y sus amigos van a investigar a la planta de energía cercana, donde encuentran a Magnemite y un huésped de Grimer. ¿Serán responsables del apagón en la ciudad?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Ash, Brock, Misty y Pikachu se encuentran muy perdidos en las montañas. Mientras se apresuran por un camino irregular que no aparece en su mapa, ¡de repente oyen una gran explosión!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: ¡En su camino hacia el siguiente reto de Batalla de Gimnasio parece que se han perdido. ¡Ash y sus amigos llegan a una enorme mansión que parece ser la guarida oculta de un ninja! ¿Acaso será el Gimnasio Fucsia?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de tomar el lugar de la herida Lara, ¿podrá Ash controlar a su feroz Ponyta y guiarlo para ganar la carrera anual?

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Nuestros héroes acompañan a la Oficial Jenny al interior del bosque en persecución de unos cazadores. Pronto descubren a un niño en medio de una manada de Kangaskhan. Su nombre es Tommy y nadie sabe el secreto de su infancia.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Luego de encontrar un muy largo puente que sólo puede cruzarse en bicicleta, un trabajo repartiendo medicina es el boleto perfecto para que Ash y sus amigos lleguen a Pueblo Soleado.

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!
programme.desc: Atrapados en un repentino chubasco, nuestros héroes rápidamente buscan refugio. Tras arrastrar a una renuente Misty, Ash y Brock entran a una cabaña, ¡y de inmediato tienen la impresión de que no están solos!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.title: Pokémon: ¡Yo te elijo!

programme.desc: Nurse Christine Chapel is reunited with her old fiancé on Exo III, but the scientist has plans for Captain Kirk and the Federation.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: A strange group of children are discovered on an Earth-like planet.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk investigates an experimental facility for holding prisoners and finds a sinister scheme.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk bluffs his way past what appears to be a powerful alien.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Spock hijacks the Enterprise to return an injured Captain Pike to Talos IV.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Spock hijacks the Enterprise to return an injured Captain Pike to Talos IV.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Kirk is one of the last survivors who can identify a mass killer, who lurks among a Shakespearean troupe aboard the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The Enterprise must decide on its response when a Romulan ship makes a destructively hostile armed probe of Federation territory.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: A U.S.S. Enterprise landing party beams down to an uncharted planet. The planet seems like a perfect candidate for shore leave with its "Earth-type" characteristics.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: Spock commands a stranded away team when their shuttlecraft is stranded on a planet with hostile natives.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: A powerful entity known as Trelane torments the crew of the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The U.S.S. Enterprise is in pursuit of an unknown alien ship which has destroyed a Starfleet base.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Original Series
programme.desc: The U.S.S. Enterprise is thrown into a time warp and ends up orbiting Earth in the 20th century.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: The nature of Trill symbiosis is explored when a Klaestron commando legal team tries to kidnap Jadzia Dax for alleged treason committed by Curzon, the prior Dax host.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: The master Kobliad criminal-scientist Rao Vantika is presumed dead after an inmate transport fire, but his wily pursuer Ty Kajada is not so sure.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Quark's attempt at deception toward a newly-encountered alien race places the space station's senior officers in a labyrinth of danger.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Grand Nagus Zek, the leader of the Ferengi Alliance, pays a surprise visit to lowly Quark's Bar to host a conference on exploiting the Gamma Quadrant -- and names Quark, not his own son, as his successor.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: An alien criminal from the other side of the wormhole tempts Odo by telling the shape-shifter he can put the changeling in contact with others like himself.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko, Kira, and Bashir are stranded in a war-torn world where it is impossible for the combatants to die.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Chief O'Brien is reluctantly "adopted" as a spiritual leader by a Bajoran village that annually follows the "Storyteller" to fight a demon of the town's collective fears.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: A stubborn old Bajoran farmer forces Kira to take a good look at how much she has changed since her alliance with the Federation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When members of the station find their fantasies coming to life, it becomes the prelude to a very real danger, which threatens everyone.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: While an alien entity wreaks havoc with the station's computer, the irrepressible Lwaxana Troi sets her sights on romance--with Odo.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Odo is caught in the middle when an alien influence pits Kira against Sisko in a deadly power struggle.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Kira is forced to re-examine her post-occupation prejudices about Cardassians when her running battle of wits with a jailed man claiming to be a notorious death camp leader is actually his remorseful file clerk.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: When a Bajoran spiritual leader objects to Keiko's secular teachings, she threatens to destroy the alliance between Bajor and the Federation.

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Kira risks her life, and war with the Cardassians, to rescue a mythical Bajoran hero from a distant prison colony.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When the Enterprise is advised by a passing Klingon vessel that there is strange debris in orbit around a nearby planet, they investigate only to find a piece of a NASA spacecraft emblazoned with the US flag.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Deep in space, the Enterprise comes across a Federation shuttlecraft that is floating in space and without much power but which does exhibit the life signs of one human aboard.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riker's delight at being offered command of the USS Aries turns to frustration when the man sent to prepare him for his mission is his estranged father; Worf's behavior leads Wesley to delve into Klingon tradition.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: On arriving at a newly identified planetary group, the crew finds that the entire system is unstable.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Q tries to prove that Picard needs him as part of their crew by hurling the Enterprise 7,000 light-years away from where they encounter the Borg for the first time.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With Picard away for routine surgery, the Enterprise responds to an apparent distress call from a Pakled vessel.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Starfleet receives an Earth-like distress signal from deep in space, the Enterprise is sent to investigate.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise is transporting delegates to a diplomatic conference dealing with Federation membership. Counselor Troi is more than just a bit embarrassed when her mother Lwaxanna, as outrageous as ever, arrives on board the Enterprise.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise is ordered to proceed to an emergency Rendez-Vous to collect a special envoy who is traveling from Starbase 153 to meet them.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The crew of the Enterprise participates in war games.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Riker returns from an away team mission wounded and infected with microbes from the planet below. He is soon in a coma in sick bay, the microbes having fused itself to his sciatic nerve and impeding his normal functions.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise is carrying an eminent scientist, Dr. Paul Stubbs, to the site of a binary star where they are expecting a massive stellar explosion to occur in a few hours.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a century of silence, the Enterprise receives a message from the Sheliac system informing them that they have discovered a human colony on a world in their sector.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise responds to a distress call from Rana IV, a Federation colony that is under attack from an unknown alien ship.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Janeway must escape from a city under siege by the Mokra, a brutal regime determined to crush the growing resistance movement against it.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: After Torres reactivates a humanoid robot, she's drawn into a war between robotic enemies.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Hoping to strengthen Voyager's strategic position in the quadrant, Janeway reluctantly seeks an alliance with the Kazon.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Paris makes history by becoming the first person to cross the transwarp threshold, but could pay for the achievement with his life.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Unable to come up with a logical motive for a shipboard murder, Tuvok performs a mind-meld with the perpetrator that brings out Tuvok's "killer instinct."

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Torres races against time to stop a deadly self-guided missile on a collision course with disaster.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A rebel Q escapes from incarceration and demands asylum on Voyager so he can commit suicide.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The Doctor falls in love with a Vidiian woman stricken by the deadly Phage.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Neelix helps smoke out the crewmember who has been passing Federation secrets to the Kazon.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A space anomaly generates a duplicate Voyager and crew, but only one ship can survive an assault by Vidiian invaders.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: After crash-landing on a moon, Tuvok encounters three terrified children who claim they've been brought there to die.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Thanks to a complex sensory system controlled by a computer, Kim and others are literally held hostage by fear.

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A bizarre occurrence during transport causes Tuvok and Neelix to fuse into one alien humanoid known as "Tuvix."

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: After contracting a deadly virus, Janeway and Chakotay are forced into exile on a planet that shields them from the effects of the fatal disease.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: With the need for food and water becoming dire, Dr. Rush manages to find a planet within range that seems viable but can only be accessed by shuttle. When nearing the planet, they encounter violent turbulence and must make a dangerous crash landing.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: O'Neill awakens, seemingly from a 79-year cryogenic sleep, to find that his team is long dead. He soon discovers that it's all a setup and he is actually a prisoner of the Goa'uld, who intend to learn all his secrets…and then destroy him!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Hathor captures O'Neill and implants him with a destructive Goa'uld symbiote that could eventually kill him. Meanwhile, O'Neill's rescue party is defeated by Hathor's invincible energy barrier and time is running out. Is there a way to save O'Neill?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: When SG-1 hunts for a Goa'uld lord living on Earth, they discover this powerful alien in the form of a religious leader with an armed cult following. O'Neill faces off with both government agents and the cult in a clash that may destroy them all.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: O'Neill (Richard Dean Anderson) attempts to stop a massive Goa'uld invasion of Earth. But to call off the attack, the Goa'uld lords demand the destruction of the Stargate. O'Neill doesn't fully trust them - but the fate of Earth lies in the balance.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A mysterious tablet discovered on a distant planet infects anyone who touches it with a hallucinogen. The remarkable stone infects Teal'c and, before long, the entire team except Hammond. Can Hammond (Don S. Davis) stop it and save SG-1 alone?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: As part of an exchange program with the planet Orban, O'Neill travels to Earth with a girl who possesses incredible technical knowledge. But by the time O'Neill discovers the truth behind the child's superior mind…it may be too late for them all.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Alternate reality versions of Carter (Amanda Tapping) and Kawalsky (Jay Acovone) are found in Area 51. Brought to Stargate Command, they start to deteriorate. However, return to their own reality means death, as their world was invaded by Goa'uld!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 is captured by Aris Boch, a bounty hunter chasing an evil Goa'uld named Kel'tar. He offers them freedom in exchange for their help. They agree, only to find that Kel'tar is, in fact, a Tok'ra, whose capture would endanger countless others.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: On another one of their quests, SG-1 encounters a medieval civilization and frees a woman tied to a stake as a sacrifice to a demon. When the woman is freed, the demon vows to destroy the village unless the SG-1 team is offered up in appeasement.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 lands in the middle of a blazing battle between some Stargate soldiers and a Jaffa army. Believing the soldiers to be the missing-in-action SG-11 team, O'Neill and the others provide assistance… until the mystery team turns its weapons on SG-1!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: During a rescue of captured Abydonians, Daniel finds his missing wife, Sha're. But instead of greeting him, she attacks him - leading to her death at the hands of Teal'c. Distraught over her death and angry at Teal'c, Daniel quits Stargate Command.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters an entire planet suffering from amnesia. The planet's leader, a woman named Ke'ra, returns to Earth with SG-1 to find a cure. But as Ke'ra and Daniel develop a mutual attraction, SG-1 suspects she may not be who she appears to be.

programme.title: Stargate Atlantis
programme.desc: O'Neill and Woolsey, the lone survivors of the replicators' bloody coup, hide out in an abandoned section of the city. Knowing Landry has an order to nuke Atlantis if a foothold situation should ever arise, the two lay low awaiting their fate.

programme.title: Stingray Djazz

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's all fun and games, literally, when lockers are packed with leisurely pursuits and quirky pastimes; a rec room boom is in full swing on this extra playful episode.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The cast's competitive spirit escalates into full-blown confrontations; as the bidding wars get intense, the tempers start to flare, turning the auction yard into a battlefield; who will keep their cool, and who will get burned?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: San Bernardino is full of surprises, particularly for Rene and Casey, who roll the dice on some sealed totes; Kenny stumbles over some odd-looking car parts; Lisa shields herself from disaster with an unusually expensive locker.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Less is mostly more in Brea; Rene swings for the fences on a costly gamble; Brandi has to dig through trash but really puts her heart into it nonetheless; Ivy and Pops clear up confusion over a massive, mysterious mechanism.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: A three-ring circus erupts when the buyers head to Irvine, Calif.; Darrell speculates that Dave has gone broke.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The sun beats down in Oceanside, Calif., bringing out all the parasols; Dusty and Lupe steal a no-brainer locker, which pays off handsomely; Darrell taxes himself, and it almost puts him in storage jail; Brandi and Lisa find their true identities.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene gets lukewarm results bobbing for profits in Stanton; Dusty finds a hoard of quality equipment, inking himself a decent payday; looking for treasure, Brandi ends up with the green in an unexpected manner.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny treats Perris, Calif., like a European vacation, picking up women along the way; Jarrod's lousy locker doesn't offer him any protection; Rene's tools end up being older than he expects.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Overwhelmed by the sheer number of units up for auction in Rialto, Calif., Mary and Ivy wager that each can better predict final locker prices than the other; Dave's locker resembles a chop shop; Rene and Tatianna score vintage sporting goods.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Darrell has to deal with Kimber's eyes on a competitor; Ivy brings a full truck, hoping for a second haul; Dusty unpacks what could be the ultimate assistant; Rene's hunch serves him well, putting together one of his greatest profits.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Rene's superstitious attitude could prove to be a hindrance; Ivy trusts his gut; Jarrod and Brandi manage to get the last laugh on their rivals.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Laura tries to comfort buyers with "hot" cocoa and umbrellas; Brandi changes her plans for a chance at a big win; Kenny risks his money on the contents of a file cabinet; Casey's gamble lands Rene a rare chance to focus on his target.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers encounter fierce competition from "The Kings of Swag" in Lake Elsinore, Calif.; Jarrod and Brandi feud; an item has an astronomical price tag.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers invade Ivy's home turf of Lancaster, Calif.; Mary attempts to make a deal with an unexpected ally; Jarrod and Brandi pressure their colleagues; Rene tries to prove his superiority.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Kenny tiptoes down memory lane in Orange, Calif.; Brandi and Jarrod get to work on a tool locker; Darrell and his granddaughter dig up a creepy find.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Tucked away in his storage Man Cave, Barry Weiss and Kenny sit down with Brandi and the Dotsons to relive old times, find out what they've been doing and gather intelligence, as he plans his return to the auction game.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The buyers try their luck at a new facility in La Habra, where Ivy decides to teach them a lesson; Dusty brews himself up an interesting unit, while Kenny weighs the value of childhood memories when selecting a locker.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberryland’s one movie theatre goes out of business, Strawberry has an idea to save it: she and her friends can film a movie to show there and attract crowds back to the theatre.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake is planning a first birthday party for her sister Apple Dumpling, so she sets off on an adventure to find the perfect party supplies.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s the first day of spring in Strawberryland, at least it’s supposed to be, but with the cold winds blowing and frost on the ground it looks as though spring isn’t going to come this year.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony hurts her leg and must stay in bed instead of heading off for a grand adventure.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry’s cat Custard is shown to live a pampered, adored existence in Strawberry’s house. But Custard’s dream set-up is shattered by the sudden arrival of a rambunctious stray puppy.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Conniving Peppermint Fizz talks the other kids into a competition to see whose pet is best. Peppermint cheats so that her pet, Cola Chameleon, wins best pet.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is feeling left out of all the kids’ play. She’s the only one with four legs. There’s no one like her to talk to and share her feelings.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Honey Pie Pony is excited that the ponies of Ice Cream Island have invited her to take part in their annual Festival of the Horses.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Angel Cake likes everything 'just so' — and when things don’t go her way, she’s a pretty bad sport.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Peppermint Fizz is so determined to win the Nearly Once-A-Yearly Strawberryland Games.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: When Strawberry & Friends go on an overnight campout, Ginger Snap doesn’t want them to find out, she’s afraid of the dark!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: There’s someone…or something strange in the neighborhood, and the kids imagine the worst.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry is made to feel self-conscious about an old, patched-together raincoat that she has.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Peppermint Fizz wants to exclude a new girl, Blueberry Muffin, because she’s 'different' – in the way she looks, lives, talks, etc.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry’s friend Coco Calypso lives on Seaberry Beach with her pet, Papaya Parrot, and a band of fun-loving monkeys.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: A fantasy episode in which Strawberry, Rainbow Sherbet, Blueberry Muffin, Coco Calypso, and Seaberry Delight imagine themselves as Mermaids, drawn into a grand adventure.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake’s friendship letter to children worldwide elicits Crepes Suzette's invitation to visit Pearis and the Pieffel Tower.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Friends from all over the world descend on Strawberryland to take part in the first Great Friendship Festival.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Out gathering berries one day, Strawberry & her pets find a tiny fairy among the berry vines.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: One windy day, a tiny fairy named Sherry Bobbleberry gets blown into Strawberry’s open window.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Love is in the air when Lieutenant Bubba Skinner rekindles a romance with his high school sweetheart, the newly-widowed Christine Millings. To Bubba's surprise, her attorney is murdered and she's suddenly looking like the prime suspect.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: While fishing on his day off, Bubba Skinner's dog unearths a dead baby. The investigation leads to a mentally-challenged girl and her family who’s not interested in talking. Will they get past the family’s secrets to learn the truth about the baby?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Having served his time, Prosper Hoag is on parole and back home in Sparta. The folks in town will never forget the accident he caused that resulted in the death of three children and permanent injuries to two others, but will they forgive him?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Chief Gillespie's personal relationship with Harriet DeLong is tested when her ex-husband Vic Glendon is caught committing an armed robbery, and her son Eugene is suspected of being involved when some of the stolen money is found in his possession.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Sweet's friends, the Tibbits, are an older couple that own a bookshop in Sparta. When Mrs. Tibbits is shot and killed during an apparent robbery, Gillespie and Tibbs question the suspicious circumstances around her death. Was her death planned?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Virgil Tibbs is working hard to reunite his family, when he discovers that his aunt's son may be involved in a murder. Virgil is caught between hurting his aunt who loves her son and bringing justice to the town he works to protect every day.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The owner of a local gym in Sparta, Kathleen Wheartly, tries to protect her delinquent brother, Jack, who is falsely accused of murder. She soon finds that her own life is in danger when a ruthless bounty hunter shows up in town, looking for Jack.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: It’s Christmastime and an eager journalist from the local Sparta Herald newspaper begs to interview the police force; however, when she twists their stories to fit her negative agenda, the officers learn a hard lesson about the power of the press.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Gillespie and Tibbs investigate a fatal car crash. The driver, Robbie Jeffries, suffered severe injuries in the accident, and his girlfriend Becky was killed. Everyone is surprised when the medical reports show Robbie may have been poisoned.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Ray Garrett was convicted of murdering his wife's lover. Pleading his innocence from the start, he was still convicted of the crime and sentenced to death. Will time run out for the death row prisoner as the Sparta police attempt to save his life?

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Terry and Derek Johnson are two brothers at odds with each other. Terry makes good grades and has a scholarship waiting for him, but Derek has chosen to deal drugs. When a local boy dies of an overdose, Gillespie wants Derek charged with murder.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: The Sparta Police investigate a suspicious car crash and discover connections to a fraudulent development plan to build a new mall in Sparta and to the murder of Virgil Tibbs’ old friend who had invested his life savings into the deal.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: Julie Lofton is a blind woman who witnesses the murder of her neighbor and quickly calls the Sparta police. As the police investigate, they discover the murder was committed to cover up an industrial crime, and now Julie's life may be in danger.

programme.title: In the Heat of the Night
programme.desc: A high school student is the only witness to the brutal rape of his teacher, but his overprotective father refuses to allow him to get involved. He wants to help catch the man that assaulted his teacher, but is he brave enough to disobey his father?

programme.desc: Terry and Derek Johnson are two brothers at odds with each other. Terry makes good grades and has a scholarship waiting for him, but Derek has chosen to deal drugs. When a local boy dies of an overdose, Gillespie wants Derek charged with murder.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Some killers choose to hide their victims – And investigators must then rely on forensic examiners to uncover proof of murder – These are just two extraordinary crimes that have made their way into the medical examiner's casebook.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson fires are set for their own sake, or to cover a different crime, such as murder. Think fire consumes all vital clues? Think again. Arson investigators can glean important clues from scorched rubble and ignite the unquenchable flames of justice.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At a crime scene, anything left behind or seemingly out of place is considered a clue. But a fire can extinguish everything in its path –challenging forensic investigators at every turn and making each arson a trial by fire.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: For homicide investigators, it's a race against time as they track their deadliest foe: a serial killer for whom killing is the only way to feel alive.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Identifying Burned Remains: It's difficult to have a murder investigation without a body, and burning up the victim is a time-honored method of destroying physical evidence.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: They say that a burden shared is a burden halved, but when partners team up to commit murder, the weight of their guilt remains just as heavy. Investigators must rely on forensic science to capture partners in crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Psychological Profiling: Journey into the dark recesses and calculated madness present only in our worst nightmares…and in the minds of serial killers.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When lovers turn on each other, or marriages fail, some ruthless spouses find a grisly way to gain an uncontested divorce – with no paperwork. When murder tears lovers apart, forensic science must put piece together the mystery to catch the killer.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When a theft is committed, something valuable is stolen. But when a criminal needs a new identity, theft becomes a matter of life and death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Weeks pass as forensic investigators search for even the smallest clues, only to find what they feared in their own backyard. In Canada, two people die suddenly of unknown causes, and their deaths may not be as coincidental as they first appear.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Philadelphia's Vidocq Society, named after an 18th Century French detective, is one of the world's most unusual crime-solving organizations.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.
